title: complete archive of evangelion art
wikitext:
[]: complete archive of evangelion art?             Quote Post by BadComoc » Wed Oct 27, 2021 1:04 am i can very easily find all or a lot of the artbooks and manga or even stills from the show, movies, girlfriend of steel or Ayanami raising project. but i haven't been able to find an archive for any of the promotional artwork like with the eva store, radio eva, or collaborations. does this already exist?

[]: Re: complete archive of evangelion art?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Oct 27, 2021 3:14 am This: https://web.archive.org/web/20190110013 ... k-and-misc And e-hentai will have most of what you need. Just search for Evangelion there. Additionally for merch, try eva-info.

[]: Re: complete archive of evangelion art?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Oct 27, 2021 7:23 pm "Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017" is a very good collection of promo art from those years, including Eva Store, pachinko posters and lots more https://www.amazon.co.jp/-/en/khara/dp/1974707032/ localized with translated image credit/descriptions: https://www.amazon.com/Evangelion-Illus ... 974707032/
